lines.english: Lesson 135
lines.chinese: 第135课
lines.raw: Lesson 135 | 第135课

lines.english: The latest report
lines.chinese: 最新报道
lines.raw: The latest report | 最新报道

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.chinese: 听录音，然后回答问题。
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答问题。

lines.english: Is Karen Marsh going to retire, do you think?
lines.chinese: 你认为卡伦·马什会退休吗？
lines.raw: Is Karen Marsh going to retire, do you think? | 你认为卡伦·马什会退休吗？

lines.english: Are you really going to retire, Miss Marsh?
lines.chinese: 马什小姐，您真的要退休了吗？
lines.raw: Are you really going to retire, Miss Marsh? | 马什小姐，您真的要退休了吗？

lines.english: I may.
lines.chinese: 我可能会。
lines.raw: I may. | 我可能会。

lines.english: I can't make up my mind.
lines.chinese: 我还没下定决心。
lines.raw: I can't make up my mind. | 我还没下定决心。

lines.english: I will have to ask my future husband.
lines.chinese: 我得问问我未来的丈夫。
lines.raw: I will have to ask my future husband. | 我得问问我未来的丈夫。

lines.english: He won't let me make another film.
lines.chinese: 他不会让我再拍电影了。
lines.raw: He won't let me make another film. | 他不会让我再拍电影了。

lines.english: Your future husband, Miss Marsh?
lines.chinese: 您未来的丈夫？马什小姐？
lines.raw: Your future husband, Miss Marsh? | 您未来的丈夫？马什小姐？

lines.english: Yes.
lines.chinese: 是的。
lines.raw: Yes. | 是的。

lines.english: Let me introduce him to you.
lines.chinese: 让我把他介绍给你们。
lines.raw: Let me introduce him to you. | 让我把他介绍给你们。

lines.english: His name is Carlos.
lines.chinese: 他叫卡洛斯。
lines.raw: His name is Carlos. | 他叫卡洛斯。

lines.english: We're going to get married next week.
lines.chinese: 我们下周结婚。
lines.raw: We're going to get married next week. | 我们下周结婚。

lines.english: Look, Liz!
lines.chinese: 看，莉兹！
lines.raw: Look, Liz! | 看，莉兹！

lines.english: Here's another report about Karen Marsh.
lines.chinese: 这是关于卡伦·马什的另一篇报道。
lines.raw: Here's another report about Karen Marsh. | 这是关于卡伦·马什的另一篇报道。

lines.english: Listen: 'Karen Marsh: The latest.
lines.chinese: 听着：“卡伦·马什：最新报道。
lines.raw: Listen: 'Karen Marsh: The latest. | 听着：“卡伦·马什：最新报道。

lines.english: At her London Hotel today Miss Marsh told reporters she might retire.
lines.chinese: 今天，马什小姐在伦敦的饭店告诉记者，她可能会退休。
lines.raw: At her London Hotel today Miss Marsh told reporters she might retire. | 今天，马什小姐在伦敦的饭店告诉记者，她可能会退休。

lines.english: She said she couldn't make up her mind.
lines.chinese: 她说她还没下定决心。
lines.raw: She said she couldn't make up her mind. | 她说她还没下定决心。

lines.english: She said she would have to ask her future husband.
lines.chinese: 她说她得问问她未来的丈夫。
lines.raw: She said she would have to ask her future husband. | 她说她得问问她未来的丈夫。

lines.english: She said her future husband would not let her make another film.
lines.chinese: 她说她未来的丈夫不会让她再拍电影了。
lines.raw: She said her future husband would not let her make another film. | 她说她未来的丈夫不会让她再拍电影了。

lines.english: Then she introduced us to Carlos and told us they would get married next week.'
lines.chinese: 然后她把卡洛斯介绍给我们，并告诉我们他们下周结婚。”
lines.raw: Then she introduced us to Carlos and told us they would get married next week.' | 然后她把卡洛斯介绍给我们，并告诉我们他们下周结婚。”

lines.english: That's sensational news, isn't it, Kate?
lines.chinese: 这真是个爆炸性新闻，不是吗，凯特？
lines.raw: That's sensational news, isn't it, Kate? | 这真是个爆炸性新闻，不是吗，凯特？

lines.english: It certainly is.
lines.chinese: 当然是。
lines.raw: It certainly is. | 当然是。

lines.english: He'll be her sixth husband!
lines.chinese: 他将是她的第六任丈夫！
lines.raw: He'll be her sixth husband! | 他将是她的第六任丈夫！
